title: FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parent skills training, help accessing community resources, home management, and support services. 11010 SE Division Street Suite 202 Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Families receiving TANF benefits who have a referral from an ODHS Self-Sufficiency Case Manager Hours: No standard hours (503) 335-5975 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 335-5975 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must have referral from ODHS Self-Sufficiency Case Manager FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Referral documents AREA SERVED: Clatsop and Columbia Counties Services: Child Abuse Prevention Child Abuse Support Groups Parenting Skills Classes Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - KEEP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
